# terrible_community_general_influxdb_database (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `database_name` (String) Name of the database.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `state` (String) Determines if the database should be created or destroyed.
